app.subtitle: Collaborative shopping made beautiful. Sign in to start your lists.
app.config_step1: Enable Google & Anonymous in Firebase Auth Console

coins.consumed_info: Coins are consumed starting from the oldest non-expired batch.

dashboard.title: Your Collections
dashboard.subtitle: Organize and share your shopping needs.
dashboard.reward_fail: Failed to get reward. Try again later.
dashboard.ad_error: Failed to load or show ad. Please try again later.

list_view.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this list?
list_view.empty_suggest: Add some items to get started!
list_view.discard_confirm: Discard all unsynced changes and revert to the last saved state?
list_view.reward_fail: Failed to get reward. Try again later.
list_view.ad_limit_reached: Daily limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
list_view.ad_cooldown: Please wait a minute before the next ad.

redeem_modal.title: Redeem Coupon
redeem_modal.info: Coins will be added to your balance instantly upon successful redemption.
redeem_modal.free_desc: Get 50 coins for free to start your shopping lists!
redeem_modal.free_success: Congratulations! 50 free coins added to your account.
redeem_modal.mobile_invite: Claim your free 50-coin gift on our website!

delete_account_modal.title: Delete Account?
delete_account_modal.confirm: This action is permanent. All your lists, items, and profile information will be deleted forever.
delete_account_modal.reauth_required: For security, please sign out and sign back in before deleting your account.

store.title: Coin Store
store.subtitle: Get more coins to sync your lists across devices.
store.mobile_only: In-app purchases are only available in the mobile app.
store.no_packages: No packages available at the moment.

loyalty.title: Point Cards
loyalty.subtitle: Digital Wallet
loyalty.no_cards_suggest: Add your store point cards to keep them handy while shopping.
loyalty.scan_help: You can type the number manually or use the scanner.
loyalty.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this card?
